summary: A bounded zero-gravity field for thrust-based navigation and target contact.
constraints: Set capability_profile.gravity to zero_g and allowed_controls to thrust/apply_force axes.
Keep finite touch targets inside a bounded arena.
Make targets reachable by thrust without requiring pixel labels.
Use check_objective to track touched/visited target names deterministically.
repair_guidance: If targets are not touched, cluster them closer or increase thrust/agent_strength.
Avoid dynamic targets drifting out of the arena before interaction.
